Task description states 'for the full year of 2024 (Jan 1, 2024 - Dec 31, 2024)'; MSFT.Last.txt last record is 20241231
Metadata specifies min_rows: 5; this refers to minimum execution records expected from backtest strategy
Direct file count: wc -l /workspace/data/MSFT.Last.txt returns 502 data rows
First record in MSFT.Last.txt: 20230103; note data spans 2023-2024, not just 2024
Inspection of MSFT.Last.txt records: semicolon-delimited OHLCV format identical to AAPL and SPY data files

Task description specifies 'SampleMACrossover' strategy; this is a built-in NinjaTrader sample strategy

privileged_info_summary: The task backtests the SampleMACrossover strategy on MSFT stock using real Yahoo Finance daily OHLCV data covering 502 trading days from January 3, 2023 through December 31, 2024. The task requires exporting the execution list (individual trades) to msft_executions.csv with a minimum of 5 execution records. The MSFT data file contains split-adjusted (not dividend-adjusted) prices ranging from $239-$426 in the specified period. NinjaTrader 8's built-in SampleMACrossover strategy will be backtested on 2024 data specifically (Jan 1 - Dec 31, 2024) as stated in task requirements. The verification requires file existence, correct instrument, correct year, minimum row count, and VLM confirmation that Strategy Analyzer and Executions tab were visible.
